description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a white fence and a spacious green lawn. The front features a double carport with two vehicles, a prominent entryway, and large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a wide patio with outdoor dining furniture and a uniquely shaped swimming pool, complemented by a shaded pergola and landscaped greenery. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, as well as expansive glass doors that connect the indoor and outdoor living spaces. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a mix of large picture windows and smaller rectangular panes distributed across the facade. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, expansive windows, a carport, and a backyard featuring a patio and swimming pool. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with open outdoor spaces and a white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double carport, main entryway, and large windows, with a white fence and green lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, and pergola, with visible balconies and terraces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide patio, outdoor dining area, and the uniquely shaped swimming pool, as well as large glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, pergola, and additional green space, with a clear view of the house's flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and rectangular panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide door, and adjacent carport, featuring clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
